# [Higoralves.dev](https://higoralves.dev)

A personal blog to show every project I participated and my blog where I share my knowledge.

# Getting Started

## Running locally

- Clone this repo `$ git clone https://github.com/higoralves/higoralves.dev`
- Then go to the project's folder `cd higoralves.dev`
- Install dependencies `yarn install`
- Run locally `yarn dev`

## Tests

## Stack

- Front-end: [React](https://reactjs.org/)
- Back-end: [NextJS](https://nextjs.org/)
- Styling: [Mantine](https://mantine.dev/)
- Animation: [Framer](https://www.framer.com/docs/animation/)
- Deployment: [Vercel](https://vercel.com)
